name: navbuddy-100
description: NavBuddy-100 GT evaluation split: 100 human-verified navigation samples across 4 Australian cities (Brisbane, Sydney, Melbourne, Canberra). One dashcam frame per sample, paired with OSM overhead maps. Human-annotated labels for lane-change detection and next-action prediction.
download_instructions:
To download images, you need a Google Maps API key with Street View Static API enabled.

1. Get an API key: https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/streetview/get-api-key
2. Run: navbuddy download-manifest -m data/navbuddy100_manifest.json --api-key YOUR_KEY
   Downloads 1 frame per sample (100 images, ~$0.70)
3. For sparse4 (4 frames per sample, used for video+prior evaluation):
   navbuddy download-manifest -m data/navbuddy100_manifest.json --api-key YOUR_KEY --frame-profile sparse4
   Downloads ~389 images (~$2.73)
